name: Snake
title: Snake | Weekly Arcade - Classic Arcade Game
description: Play Snake free online. Classic arcade game - eat food, grow longer, don't hit the walls! No download required.
keywords: snake game, arcade game, classic snake, browser game, free game, retro game
tips: Stay near the center of the board early on — hugging walls limits your escape routes
Plan 2-3 moves ahead instead of reacting to each food item
When your snake gets long, create a spiral pattern to maximize available space
Avoid doubling back on yourself — always keep a clear path to your tail
Speed increases as you grow, so practice quick directional changes early
howToPlay: Use arrow keys or swipe to steer the snake toward food. Each food item makes the snake grow longer. Avoid hitting the walls or your own tail. The game ends when you collide with a wall or yourself.
